novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Although he came up with a plan to trick Jiang Wei, failed, and died valiantly, he did not die in battle against Jiang Wei historically, he was a civil officer rather then a military one.

full_text:
Wang Guan (Weitai) 王觀 (偉臺)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Guan (王觀), styledWeitai (偉臺), was born in Linqiu county, Dong commandery. Helped the northern provinces strengthen its defenses. Wang Guan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wang Guan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
